unit: 4 inner-RPI / scope-shift-detected event types in cli/lib/types.ts

contract.goal: Add 4 new inner-RPI event types to cli/lib/types.ts and wire them into the Event discriminated union. Pure type declarations, no behavior. Mirrors D1 of Phase 3 and Phase 4 exactly. D2 of Phase 5 will modify /ev-loop-interactive's scope-shift detection step to emit these.
acceptance_criteria: cli/lib/types.ts adds 4 new EventBase<...> type aliases under an 'Inner-RPI events (Phase 5)' section header.
Names follow the established kebab-case sibling pattern.
All 4 are wired into the Event discriminated union at the bottom.
rules_applied: PLAN.md Phase 5 lines 407-409 dictates the 4 event names.
Three-phase pattern: D1 grounds the type vocabulary D2 will use.
Sibling consistency with Phase 3/4's type-only D1 pattern.
disqualifiers: Adding events beyond the 4 PLAN.md Phase 5 names.
inputs: cli/lib/types.ts (Phase 3 + Phase 4 event types as the structural model)

actions: Cut branch phase-5-inner-rpi from main (clean tree after Phase 4 close commit pushed before merge).
Reconciled Phase 4 PR-merged state: `bin/loom phase update 4 --pr-state=merged`.

Extended cli/lib/types.ts with 4 new EventBase aliases (ScopeShiftDetectedEvent, RpiInnerTriggeredEvent, RpiInnerCompletedEvent, RpiInnerDeclinedEvent) under 'Inner-RPI events (Phase 5)' section header and wired all 4 into the Event discriminated union.
Derived evaluator panel: contract-fit + react-api + naming (fallback rules for *.ts).

Invoked /guild-validate. All 3 evaluators returned `approved`. Naming evaluator gave a thoughtful soft observation: the section comment doesn't gloss the RPI acronym (Research → Plan → Implement) for a future reader landing cold via git blame.

Applied the naming evaluator's gloss suggestion: prepended a short 'RPI = Research → Plan → Implement. The "inner" qualifier distinguishes the sub-sequence triggered mid-execution from the outer RPI orchestrated by /loom-plan at project birth' note to the section comment. Free improvement — no test impact, no event-shape change.

changes_since_previous: First unit on this branch. Phase 4 closed on the prior branch (merged via PR #4). The post-merge phase-4 reconciliation (PR state → merged) is in this commit.
notes_for_pr: 4 new event types declared. D2 will emit them from /ev-loop-interactive's scope-shift step. scope-shift-detected fires on EVERY detected shift (substrate signal regardless of accept/decline); the rpi-inner-* family records the accept/decline branch and sub-sequence lifecycle.

Detail shape for ScopeShiftDetectedEvent carries `signals: string[]` listing which signal sources fired (evaluator-finding, user-comment, whiteboard-contradiction, phase-boundary) — useful for forensics on which combinations trigger shifts most often.

Naming evaluator's soft observation drove a section-comment gloss: 'RPI = Research → Plan → Implement.' Free polish for a future reader landing cold on the file. The same gloss is not retroactively added to the Research/Plan event sections — keeping section-header verbosity consistent across the file is the trade-off.
